commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `completedTurn` signal to Claude stream-json CLI parsing and skips `empty_response` failover when a terminal result event completed with no assistant text.

PR surface: Source +13, Tests +6. Total +19 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, though I did not run a live Claude CLI session. A blank Claude stream-json `type: "result"` currently parses to empty text and then trips the `empty_response` failover guard in `runPreparedCliAgent`.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is contributor or maintainer real behavior proof for an external PR that changes fallback routing, not a narrow code repair ClawSweeper can safely provide.

target.title: fix(cli): prevent empty_response failover for completed thinking-only turns
target.body:
## Summary

- A claude-cli turn that finishes with `stop_reason=end_turn` and only a thinking block (no text) is a valid "nothing to say" response
- The empty assistant text previously triggered `FailoverError` with `reason=empty_response`, causing the model-fallback chain to re-run the turn on a different fallback model
- Added `completedTurn` flag to `CliOutput`, set when the JSONL parser finds a result event
- `executeCliAttempt` now skips the failover throw when a turn completed successfully

## Change Type

- [x] Bug fix

## Scope

- [x] Gateway (CLI backend failover)

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** Completed claude-cli thinking-only turns no longer trigger an `empty_response` model-fallback re-run on a different model.

**Environment tested:** Node 22.x on Linux, pnpm test.

**Steps run after the patch:** Ran cli-output.test.ts (26 tests) plus CI format/lint checks.

**Evidence after fix:**

```text
pnpm test --run src/agents/cli-output.test.ts

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  26 passed (26)
```

**Observed result:** All 26 tests pass, including new expectations for `completedTurn: true` in Claude stream-json result parsing tests.

**Not tested:** Live claude-cli gateway session with real thinking-only end_turn reproduction.

## Root Cause

`parseClaudeCliJsonlResult` already correctly returns `{ text: "", sessionId, usage }` when claude-cli emits a result event with empty text (tool-only or thinking-only turns). But `executeCliAttempt` treated any empty `output.text` as a transient failure regardless of the session state, throwing `FailoverError` and activating the model-fallback chain.

## User-visible / Behavior Changes

Claude-cli turns that finish with only a thinking block (no text reply) no longer display a "Model Fallback" banner and re-run on a fallback model.

## Security Impact

- New permissions? No
- Secrets handling changed? No
- New network calls? No

Closes #89008
